query: Computer, run a diagnostic on all Sherlock Holmes files. Display any anomalous programming sequences.
response: Diagnostic complete. All files conform to specified parameters, except those contained in protected memory.

query: Computer, begin Sherlock Holmes programme three A and place us in the drawing room at Two Twenty One B Baker Street.
Computer, route all command functions to the Bridge.

response: Picard command codes are no longer valid.

query: Computer, what is being displayed here?
Computer, route all command functions to this location.
Computer, run Sherlock Holmes Programme three A.
response: That programme is already in use.

query: Computer, interface with the central computer on the Enterprise.
Computer. Store programme Picard delta one in active memory and discontinue simulation.
